description: Product Description Why choose our heart necklaces? 1.The lobster clasp is durable and easy to remove. The necklace is separated from the chain and the length can be adjusted to personal preference. It closes tightly and does not trap clothes or hair easily. 2.Our silver heart necklace is set with sparkling zircon, which is the best substitute for real diamonds, perfectly set on the necklace. Harmless to the skin and not easy to fade. 3.The chain length is 45cm/ 17.72 inches, the size of the pendant is 1.5 * 1.7cm/ 0.59 * 0.67 inches, heart necklace women is a romantic and sweet endorsement, suitable for all ladies or girls.
